title: Finders Keepers collection - video walk through!
excerpt: Although I have been thinking about it for a while, I finally got around to filming and editing this video walk-through of my latest collection with American Crafts, Finders Keepers. I realized after filming that I forgot to include two…
body:
Although I have been thinking about it for a while, I finally got around to filming and editing this video walk-through of my latest collection with American Crafts, Finders Keepers. I realized after filming that I forgot to include two items - the mini doilies and the skinny washi tapes! Oopsy. Will try and incorporate those into future projects and a video. You can see the washi tape in action in my Midori Traveler's Notebook in this video of our CicLAvia adventure.

Finders Keepers is available at these fine online retailers: Simon Says Stamp | Blue Moon Scrapbooking | Scrapbook.com 

You can also ask your local scrapbook stores to carry Amy Tangerine + American Crafts products! Thanks as always for your love and support! My favorite part is seeing what you all create!! If you use my products and share on social media, please use #amytangerine and #ATfinderskeepers
